name: Poffertges--Doughnuts from Holland
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the butter to a saucepan and melt it.
2. Pour in the milk and stir until the mixture is hot.
3. Gradually add the flour and salt, stirring constantly to combine.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring continuously, until the dough thickens enough that it doesn't stick to the sides of the pan.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the sugar and beaten eggs until smooth.
6. Form the batter into small balls.
7. Fry the balls in deep fat until they are dark brown.
Note: This is similar to a cream puff recipe, except they are fried instead of baked.
